faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Answers to common questions about AI model training, pricing, privacy, and image generation.

whyNotChatGPT.question: Why use My AI Photo Shoot instead of a general AI chat app?
whyNotChatGPT.answer: General AI chat apps are built for many tasks. My AI Photo Shoot is focused on repeatable photo generation from your selfies: train a personal model once, keep a consistent likeness, use photo-focused presets, and generate as many portraits as you need at a predictable per-image price.

howItWorks.question: How does AI photo generation work?
howItWorks.answer: You upload a small set of selfies, and we train a personal AI model that learns your appearance. After training, you can generate new images of yourself in different outfits, poses, settings, and visual styles.

freeHeadshot.question: Is there a free AI headshot generator?
freeHeadshot.answer: Some tools offer free previews or limited trials. My AI Photo Shoot is not positioned as a free generator: you pay $2.99 once to train your personal model, then $0.03 per generated image, with no subscription.

chatgptHeadshot.question: Can ChatGPT make a professional headshot?
chatgptHeadshot.answer: General AI chat apps can help with image prompts, but they are not built around a reusable personal photo model. My AI Photo Shoot trains on your selfies so you can keep a more consistent likeness across many headshot and profile photo styles.

linkedinPolicy.question: Is it OK to use AI-generated images for LinkedIn profiles?
linkedinPolicy.answer: Many people use AI-generated headshots for LinkedIn when the image is realistic, current, and clearly represents them. Avoid misleading edits, and choose a clean professional style that matches how you want to appear in work contexts.

photoToHeadshot.question: How do I turn a photo into a headshot?
photoToHeadshot.answer: Upload clear selfies, train your personal AI model, then generate headshot prompts with professional lighting, clean backgrounds, and work-ready clothing. After training, you can create multiple headshot options from the same model.

pricing.question: How much does it cost?
pricing.answer: Pricing is pay as you go: $2.99 to train your personal AI model once, then $0.03 for each generated image. There are no monthly subscriptions or hidden fees.

privacy.question: Is my data safe and private?
privacy.answer: You control your privacy settings. Choose public or private galleries, delete photos when you want, and manage your image library from your account. We do not sell your personal data.

imageQuality.question: What quality are the generated images?
imageQuality.answer: Images are generated in high resolution for social media, profile photos, marketing assets, creative projects, and many print use cases. Quality depends on the selfies you upload and the prompt you choose.

howManyPhotos.question: How many photos can I generate?
howManyPhotos.answer: After your AI model is trained, you can generate as many images as you want for $0.03 each. There is no fixed bundle or monthly cap.

platforms.question: What platforms are supported?
platforms.answer: You can use My AI Photo Shoot on the web, iOS, and Android. Your generated images sync across devices when you use the same account.

dataRetention.question: How long do you keep my photos?
dataRetention.answer: Photos remain in your account until you delete them. You can permanently remove individual images or your full photo library from your account settings.

useCase.galleryDisclaimer: All examples shown were generated by our AI from user selfies.

step1.desc: Use clear existing photos or take a few new selfies.

step2.title: Train your AI model
step2.desc: We fine-tune a personal model so future images keep your likeness.

step3.desc: Create different looks, then save the images you like best.
